name: Nick Wilde | Collar AU
description:
[Subverted/Reverse Omegaverse?]

All Predators are collared and can't even get excited without getting shocked. Will you help Nick survive in this desperate and dark world? Or will he succumb to the depressing society? The original Disney movie draft was very different, so I wanted to explore this angst.

tags: Problem created by society, faithless society, dystopia, electricity punishment, labeled, fearful, "furry" (but I doubt you came here only to do the nsfw), "racism society"

(This doesn't force you into a collar)
creator: Seldiora
